commit.message: Added comments

Fix parent page scrolling when clicking anchor links in preview

scrollIntoView() propagates through all ancestor scrollable containers,
including the parent page outside the iframe. Replace with window.scrollTo()
which only scrolls the iframe's own window.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Reduced the max size for fragment link text box.

Fix anchor navigation in preview iframe

Inject a nav guard script into every srcdoc that intercepts anchor clicks:
- href="#" -> preventDefault, no-op
- href="#section" -> preventDefault, smooth scrollIntoView within preview
- href="https://..." -> preventDefault, window.open in new tab (noopener)

Always include allow-scripts and allow-popups in the iframe sandbox so the
nav guard can run regardless of JS consent. allow-modals is still only added
when the user has consented to JS. User JS is still only injected on consent.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Added a link to task 1 in the nested elements page.
Added elements task page content.

Include title in fragment share payload

- buildFragmentUrl now accepts and encodes title into the JSON payload
- parseFragment returns title alongside html/css/js (null if absent)
- Fragment load effect applies the title when present
- ShareDialog receives and passes title to buildFragmentUrl

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix dialog stacking: share/clear dialogs render over JS consent dialog

- Revert JsConsentDialog back inside the preview panel (position: absolute)
  so it only covers the preview area, allowing users to keep editing code
- Give .dialog-backdrop--fixed z-index: 500 (up from 200) with proper
  inset and flex centering so share/clear dialogs always paint over the
  JS consent dialog's z-index: 100

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Show preview iframe when there is no JavaScript content

Previously the iframe was gated on jsAllowed !== null, meaning it never
rendered until consent was given. When there was no JS (so the dialog
never appeared), the preview would get stuck loading indefinitely.

Now the iframe renders immediately when there is no JS content, and is
only held back while awaiting JS consent when hasJs is true.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Only show JS consent dialog when JavaScript content is present

Previously the dialog appeared whenever any content (HTML/CSS/JS) existed.
Now it only appears when the JS pane is non-empty or the HTML contains
a <script> tag.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Added several new pages for elements, attributes and nested elements.
Remove the link from the build simple webpages site as it's not currently ready for use yet
